---
title: "Kimi — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Descriptive catalog of canonical parser v3 parquets"
source-title: "Kimi"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, DuckDB connection, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import pandas as pd
import duckdb
from itables import init_notebook_mode
init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

from src.parsers.quarto_helpers import (
    fmt_pct, fmt_int, safe_int, show_df, show_md, plotly_bar,
    has_col, has_view, table_count, setup_notebook,
)

SOURCE_KEY     = "kimi"
SOURCE_TITLE   = "Kimi"
SOURCE_COLOR   = "#3DB39E"  # Kimi teal-green (Moonshot brand)
MUTED          = "#D1D5DB"
PROCESSED      = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "Kimi"
TABLES         = ["conversations", "messages", "tool_events", "branches"]
AUX_TABLES     = ["project_metadata", "assets"]
ACCOUNT_FILTER = None

con = duckdb.connect()
_setup = setup_notebook(con, SOURCE_KEY, PROCESSED, TABLES, AUX_TABLES, ACCOUNT_FILTER)
```

> **About Kimi:** parser v3 covering Kimi (Moonshot AI). Sender
> `user`/`assistant`/`system` mapped to canonical roles, scenario
> SCENARIO_K2D5 (K2.6 Instant default) → mode `chat`. Block-based
> messages with text/tool/file kinds — ToolEvent emitted per
> `block.tool` (web_search, fetch_urls, ipython, etc) preserving
> `args` and `contents` (search result snippets inline). Files inline
> in `chat.files[]` downloaded via signUrl (signed URLs from Moonshot
> CDN). Skills (Slides/Docs/Deep Research/Sheets/Agent Swarm/Kimi
> Code/Kimi Claw) treated as projects (custom modes). Branches V1: 1
> per conv (no fork detection — DAG via parentId/childrenMessageIds
> mapped but no multi-leaf inference yet).

{{< include _template.qmd >}}

{{< include _template_aux.qmd >}}
